creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 204264
wxmaxima - Update to 19.05.2

Updates wxmaxima to 19.05.2.

Changelogs can be found here: https://github.com/wxMaxima-developers/wxmaxima/releases .

I added an NLS option to the port.

Tested successfully with poudriere on {11.2,12.0}-RELEASE {i386,amd64}.
